TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tabaré Vázquez, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Uruguay anini i ci Tabaré Vázquez, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi tab~b~var* b~v***o~u~uə*, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u o~u~uro~u~u*o~u~uaj anini i ʦi tab~b~var* b~v***o~u~uə*, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: I 1940 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 17 a romi'ad masofoc ci Tabaré Vázquez, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Uruguay anini i ci Tabaré Vázquez, patirengan a romi'ad i 2015 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 1 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi tab~b~var* b~v***o~u~uə*, maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u o~u~uro~u~u*o~u~uaj anini i ʦi tab~b~var* b~v***o~u~uə*, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka * a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ.
